---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a feature or ImageJ workflow to support
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Feature summary

Describe the feature.

## ImageJ workflow

Which ImageJ menu item, tool, or workflow should this correspond to?

## Why is this useful?

Explain who needs it and what it enables.

## Suggested scope

Choose one:

- Near-term MVP
- Mid-term
- Long-term
- Not sure

## Expected behavior

Describe inputs, outputs, and important details.

## References

Add ImageJ documentation links, screenshots, sample images, or papers if relevant.
